proved_lemma: If the total FZloop flux is zero, then every nonnegative flux sector is zero.
intended_gravity_use: Model restricted stationary gravity estimates using a Komar/Hawking flux-sector decomposition where nonnegative sectors and vanishing total boundary flux force sectorwise flux cancellation.
new_ingredient: FZloop packages zero-total nonnegative flux cancellation as a reusable localization primitive for restricted stationary gravity estimates.
